content: Supervisor note: current main repo now contains `docs/specifications/framework/taskplane-runtime-v2/01-architecture.md` and `extensions/taskplane/*`. If your lane snapshot still lacks them, this may be a stale execution snapshot/worktree issue rather than true repo absence. Please verify from your lane with `git ls-tree --name-only HEAD docs/specifications/framework extensions` (or equivalent). If still absent, do not fabricate; document it explicitly as a stale snapshot blocker in STATUS.md and proceed to the task’s natural blocked/failure path.
